title: Awesome Extra Coal
description: Add Extra Coal Block for smelting
body:
Add Extra Coal Blocks for smelting

This mod Add 8 tiers of Ectra Coal Blocks
```
1 Extra = 9 Coal block
2 Extra = 9  1 Extra Coal block
3 Extra = 9  2 Extra Coal block
4 Extra = 9  3 Extra Coal block
5 Extra = 9  4 Extra Coal block
6 Extra = 9  5 Extra Coal block
7 Extra = 9  6 Extra Coal block
8 Extra = 9  7 Extra Coal block
```
Every Extra coal block Add more burning time in furnace up to 750.000.000 ticks
